title: Spark / MaskZero
subtitle: MZSpark universe, character systems, battle arcs, and manifestation engine.

spark_project.description: Interactive character manifestation platform combining character creation, progression systems, battle narratives, AI-driven story arcs, and public-facing Spark experiences.

completed: Character framework and battle narrative concepts defined
in_progress: Public Spark experience moving to maskzero.site

reason: Spark is no longer a personal portfolio initiative. The project now belongs under the MaskZero ecosystem alongside the broader character, manifestation, and immersive experience roadmap.
next_actions: Integrate Spark progression with Dream.OS skill and achievement systems
blockers_note: None — Previous dadudekc.com DNS blocker retired from active planning.

retired_planning.note: dadudekc.com DNS blocker removed from active planning surfaces.
